parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema for a single Person.

name.description: First and Last Name of the Person.

is_user.description: Determines if the Person can log into the app.

is_assignable.description: Determines if the Person can be assigned to tasks.

email.description: The email associated with the Person.

phone.description: The Person's phone number, if available.

can_recieve_email.description: Determines if the Person can receive email notifications.

can_recieve_sms.description: Determines if the Person can receive SMS notifications.

group_ids.description: List of Group IDs the Person belongs to.

job_title_id.description: UUID reference to the Person’s Job Title.

hourly_wage.description: Hourly wage rate for the Person.

dob.description: Date of birth of the Person.

is_male.description: Specifies if the Person identifies as male.

address_1.description: First part of the Person's address.

address_2.description: Second part of the Person's address, if applicable.

city_town.description: The city or town where the Person is located.

state_province.description: The state or province where the Person is located.

zipcode.description: The postal/zip code of the Person.

country.description: The country where the Person is located.

emergency_contact_name.description: Name of the Person’s emergency contact.

emergency_contact_number.description: Phone number of the emergency contact.

emergency_contact_email.description: Email address of the emergency contact.

emergency_contact_relation.description: The relationship between the Person and their emergency contact.

tag_instances.description: List of tags applied to the Person.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tag Instance.

expr_date.description: Expiration date for the Tag, if applicable.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the Person was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the Person was last updated.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters or missing required values.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

403.description: Forbidden - User does not have the required permissions.

404.description: Not Found - The requested resource could not be located.
